packageRules.description: Group the Angular framework, build tooling, and angular-eslint so their version-locked majors update together in one PR
Never bump TypeScript on its own — Angular pins it to a narrow range (e.g. Angular 22 needs >=6.0 <6.1), so let major/minor TS moves ride along with the grouped Angular upgrade via ng update
Hold major Angular upgrades behind manual approval in the Dependency Dashboard, since they require running ng update migrations
